Climate Change 1992: The Supplementary Report to the IPCC Scientific Assessment

Back to overview

[1] IPCC. Climate Change 1992: The Supplementary Report to the IPCC Scientific Assessment. Report Prepared for IPCC by Working Group I. Cambridge University Press, Cambridge, UK and New York, NY, USA and Oakleigh, Victoria, Australia, 1992.

  address = {Cambridge, UK and New York, NY, USA and Oakleigh, Victoria, Australia},

Cambridge University Press, Cambridge, UK and New York, NY, USA and Oakleigh, Victoria, Australia, 1992.

Cambridge University Press, Cambridge, UK and New York, NY, USA and Oakleigh, Victoria, Australia, 1992.
